final:
module d_flip_flop (
    input wire rst_clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [3:0] D,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);
    always @(posedge rst_clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            Q <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            Q <= D;
        end
    end
endmodule
